summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Restaurateur Pro iteration 4. All new features working correctly: Secret admin login with 14-day expiry, full CRUD for Tasks and Team Members. Backend API tests: 18/18 passed. Frontend UI tests: All features verified including dialogs, dropdowns, and task completion checkbox.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/secret with valid code (restaurateur2026) returns user with 14-day session
Session cookie properly set after secret login
POST /api/tasks creates task with all fields
Task deletion verified - task no longer in database
POST /api/team creates member with all fields
Member deletion verified - member no longer in database
Landing page secret login UI (Admin Access button, input, Go button)
Dashboard shows empty states when no data exists
Add Task dialog opens and saves task
Add Team Member dialog opens and saves member
Task Edit/Delete dropdown appears on hover
Edit Task dialog opens with pre-filled data
Team Member Edit/Remove dropdown appears on hover
Edit Team Member dialog opens with pre-filled data
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for better accessibility
test_credentials: Secret code: restaurateur2026 (creates admin@restaurateurpro.com with 14-day session)
seed_data_creation: Test data created during UI testing (TEST_UI_Task_From_Playwright, TEST_UI_Member_Playwright)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Secret login endpoint at POST /api/auth/secret with code 'restaurateur2026' creates admin user with 14-day session. Full CRUD for tasks and team members working. Dashboard shows empty states initially. Quick Setup generates sample data. Task completion checkbox toggles status. Edit/Delete dropdowns appear on hover for both tasks and team members.
